title: IMA
description: An addon for Iron's Spells N Spellbooks!
body:
# IMA

An addon for Iron's Spells N Spellbooks that adds new spells.

> For more detailed information please [head over to the readme!](https://github.com/BradBot1/IMA/blob/master/README.MD)

This addon adds a few player focused spells for support based classes, allowing the enhancement of party members in a co-op server. They can have a use in single player experiences but this would be limited.


## Can you add x?

Yes! If I believe it isn't completly busted and you [create a relevent issue on the git.](https://github.com/BradBot1/IMA/issues/new)
